items.title: China grants UK and Canada visa-free entry, raising total to 79 countries
items.description: China is letting British and Canadian citizens enter without a visa as it tries to boost tourism and business

items.title: Flights are delayed as workers strike at Kenya's main airport
items.description: Flights at Kenya’s main airport are being delayed as workers launched a planned strike over a labor dispute with authorities

items.description: Global markets have mostly advanced but Japan's Nikkei 225 dipped ahead of Lunar New Year holidays after new data showed weaker-than-expected economic...

items.title: Singapore sets first ever sustainable aviation fuel levy, as Southeast Asia's fuel industry grows
items.description: Singapore is piloting the world’s first sustainable aviation fuel levy
